title: Sirocco
writer: Jean Vignaud, Pierre Chenal, Jacques Companéez
actors: Viviane Romance, Louis Jouvet, Pierre Renoir
plot: Town trollop Safia, much against her better judgment, falls in love with Matteo, a beggar and mystic in the native quarter of Sirocco. She flees to France, first as the mistress and then wife of a wealthy archaeologist, and bears ...
